problem id: 20cdbdb1
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(7)

examples:
  01100110 -> 01100000
  11001101 -> 11010001
  10101000 -> 10000001
  00100001 -> 00010000
  10100010 -> 00100001
  10101111 -> 11110001
  11111000 -> 10000001
  01101100 -> 11000000
  11110011 -> 00110001
  00111010 -> 10100000

query: 10001110
predicted answer: 11100001
